_comment: Mosquito Elite Gold Carapace (金甲蚊兵) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 5/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.

canonical.appearance: Elite mosquito with gold carapace mutation. Much stronger than regular soldiers. Commands small squads.
